programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El Mustang Bullitt
programme.desc: Danny y Báez investigan el robo del famoso coche que se conducía en una película clásica, ahora propiedad de Owen Cairo (Anthony Edwards).

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Héroes olvidados
programme.desc: Cuando Danny y su familia son amenazados por Thomas Wilder (Louis Cancelmi), un asesino en serie que Danny no ha podido detener, la preocupación de Linda se intensifica por el trabajo de su marido y por el estado de su matrimonio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Resistencia
programme.desc: Erin retoma un caso de homicidio estancado y, con la ayuda de Anthony Abetemarco, busca un testigo clave que había desaparecido.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Las banderas de nuestros padres
programme.desc: Danny es interrogado por el investigador del fiscal de distrito cuando su expareja es acusada de colocar pruebas para cerrar un caso de homicidio.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo sigue la pista a un recluso fugitivo que cose la boca a sus víctimas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo sospecha que un par de asesinos trabajan juntos, después de destapar dos cuerpos aparentemente no relacionados entre sí.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo se apresura a buscar una relación entre dos familias, una asesinada y la otra secuestrada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo está detrás de un cirujano que hace amputaciones innecesarias.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de pasar meses rastreando a su objetivo, Tony se queda con la sangre de un agente del NCIS en sus manos y es tarea de Gibbs ayudarlo a armar las piezas del rompecabezas.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS descubre una sorpresa impactante cuando un joven marine llega a su fiesta de bienvenida con una herida mortal de puñalada.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El límite entre la vida personal y profesional de McGee se difumina cuando NCIS descubre una conexión entre su abuela y el asesinato de un teniente de la Marina.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS busca al responsable de un asesino a sueldo que apunta a un Teniente Comandante de la Armada, mientras Abby descubre secretos familiares tras pruebas para donar un riñón.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Las banderas de nuestros padres
programme.desc: Danny es interrogado por el investigador del fiscal de distrito cuando su expareja es acusada de colocar pruebas para cerrar un caso de homicidio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Maldito
programme.desc: Cuando un mafioso local es asesinado a tiros en su auto, Danny y Báez intentan obtener información del chico de los recados de bajo nivel de la mafia que encuentran atado en el maletero antes de que la pandilla tome represalias.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer tracks a suspect down a treacherous cliffside, a man puts his brother and elderly father at risk, and a man asks police to take his son to jail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspected car thief's claims of innocence are undermined by a video he shot of himself earlier that day, and the pursuit of a suspected drunk driver has a surprising end.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car eludes a DUI checkpoint only to crash, one woman takes the fall for everyone in her group, and a man hides his stash in the one place he thinks police will never look.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A shifty suspect claims he wasn't the driver of a wrecked vehicle police were pursuing, and a detained cyclist attempts a tricky maneuver to rid himself of damning evidence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Reckless ATV drivers lead police on a dangerous chase through the streets of Atlanta, and a man worried about warrants lies about his identity to police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Torrential rain hampers the pursuit of a fleeing vehicle, a man on a moped is carrying more than he lets on, and a persistent police officer unravels a sketchy man's story.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Shots fired in a park after hours leads to a messy situation for one officer, and a disturbed man with a gun takes responding officers on a harrowing chase.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers track down a suspect who eluded them earlier, a suspicious vehicle takes off at the sight of police, and a man gets busted for possession in front of his mom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing driver becomes cooperative once he reaches his destination, a woman gets feisty with police, and police respond to a domestic dispute involving a frying pan.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are led on a chase by a driver they pursued just weeks earlier, and a man caught with drugs tries to pin the blame on his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers review dashcam footage after a suspect claims force was used against him unjustly, and a weed enthusiast drops some knowledge on police about the founding fathers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman leads police on a dangerous chase, a driver is remorseful for the damage he's caused, and a man's denial of solicitation is undermined by his open fly.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man loses his friend and finds trouble, officers stop a vehicle they believe was involved in a shooting, and a suspicious vehicle leads to a suspicious story.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man's mole gives him away when he tries to fool police with a fake name, a drunken man shows officers he has nothing to hide, and a reckless driver imperils a neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Numerous patrol cars give chase to a man on a dirt bike refusing to yield, and an alleged armed robber is upfront about his reasons for running from police when approached.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man blames the weed found in his car on his absent nephew, a suspect in custody starts to convulse, and police respond to a call about an armed man tripping on bath salts.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on a dirt bike tries to elude police while dumping his firearm, and after breaking up a parking lot drug deal, an officer advises a young suspect to make better choices.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After chasing down a suspect on foot, officers retrieve a fully loaded revolver from his pants, and police respond to a call about a man wielding a knife outside a bar.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing motorcyclist tries to outsmart officers by hiding his bike in a retail garden area, and a concerned citizen reports seeing a man steal a package from a porch.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A jaywalking citation escalates to resisting arrest, an SUV contains more needles than one officer is willing to deal with, and a lovers' spat draws the attention of a patrol.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man refusing to drop his knife tests an officer's patience, neighbors hold an alleged thief until police arrive, and a couple of volatile newlyweds need police intervention.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers spot a suspect running down the street with a knife, the driver of a stolen car takes off on foot after he's pulled over, and police find carjacked vehicles.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man resisting arrest draws a crowd, an armed robbery suspect takes a walk down felony lane with an officer he recognizes, and a strange scene unfolds at a DUI checkpoint.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A prostitution sting in Las Vegas nets more than just johns, police respond to reports of a woman licking the sidewalk, and a patrol happens on a lovers' row in a parking lot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist fleeing police slams into a pickup truck at high speed, and a man being frisked invents an interesting story to explain the suspicious bulge in his pants.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleet-footed deputy nabs a suspect on the run, officers responding to a domestic call are refused entry, and police try to ascertain the cause of a woman's hallucinations.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara and Greg are quarantined after responding to a crime scene contaminated with a deadly pathogen.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team suspects foul play when a chemistry teacher's science experiment goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Morgan, Sidle, and Finlay try to relax at a forensics conference when a mass shooting occurs on site.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Frustration mounts for the CSI team as another victim surfaces, and all evidence points to the Gig Harbor Killer. Guest stars include Mark-Paul Gosselaar, Mark Valley, and Patricia Arquette.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a woman full of alcohol and drugs in a pool at a rehab facility.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team delves into the kinky world of "rubber dolls" when they investigate the murder of a man stabbed in an alley.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a murder at Clark County jail after an inmate stumbles upon a body while running away from officers.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the bizarre death of a man who was killed not once, but twice. Sharon Osbourne guest stars as Elise Massey, the manager of a billiards championship.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI's investigation of the victim of an apparent hit-and-run leads them into the world of aeronautics.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team reopens a 10-year-old murder/suicide case when the sole survivor claims her accused father was innocent.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team learns the main suspect in the gig harbor killings is being released from jail due to lack of evidence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a homicide at a convention for people who collect macabre murder memorabilia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of a young victim dressed as a superhero.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a death involving a vintage Rolls Royce and a chrome-covered victim.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando dos crímenes aparentemente diferentes resultan estar vinculados, los CSIs descubren que están entrelazadas parte de la trama.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Tercera y última parte del crossover CSI, en el que el equipo de CSI de Langston ayuda a investigar una red de prostitución que puede haber albergado a un rehén que Langston ha estado buscando en Miami y Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una prueba inusual revelada durante un torneo de bolos lleva al equipo de CSI a investigar un asesinato en un boliche.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Nick, Greg y Hodges llevan a Henry a celebrar su cumpleaños a un bar de motociclistas, descubren un doble homicidio y encuentran a varios sospechosos todavía en el bar que pueden ser los asesinos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un gran tiroteo en una tienda de armas puede estar relacionado con la muerte de una mujer joven involucrada en un pacto suicida.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Dos hermosas mujeres son asesinadas en un hotel de Las Vegas y los CSI descubren a un asesino inusual durante su investigación.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se adentra en el mundo del golf profesional cuando se descubre el cuerpo de un jugador legendario durante un torneo de alto nivel.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El caso de dos estudiantes de secundaria, uno muerto y el otro desaparecido, llevan a los CSI a unas carreras callejeras de coches y a su complicada red de competición mortal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Rascal Flatts toma el centro del escenario cuando un miembro de la banda es electrocutado por su propia guitarra durante un concierto, el equipo de CSI investiga si fue un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un niño pequeño es encontrado asesinado, el equipo de CSI descubre evidencia que puede vincular su muerte con un viejo caso que resurgió recientemente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine y el detective Vartann pasan 24 horas juntos en una habitación de hotel mientras vigilan a un dúo que fabrica drogas en la habitación de al lado.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga el brutal asesinato de una familia, rastrean al asesino hasta la casa de al lado, que podría pertenecer al asesino en serie "Dr. Jekyll".

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Hodges y Wendy llevan a un grupo de exploradores de CSI de la escuela secundaria a una excursión, embellecen su papel en la resolución de casos y llevan su tarea un poco demasiado lejos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un estudiante es descubierto asesinado en la escuela de Lindsey, la investigación da un giro brusco cuando el equipo de CSI descubre una conexión poco probable entre la muerte del niño y atrocidades del pasado.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: It was supposed to be a routine undercover trip to the incinerator to dispose of drug evidence, but the police officers are ambushed.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio's case of a murdered woman is compromised when the federal agents, who have their own agenda to follow, get involved.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An ex-con who Horatio sent to jail asks him to help find his missing son. He finds marijuana while searching the boy’s room.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Students from all over the country descend on Miami for a week of fun in the sun. The party comes to a halt when the CSIs are called in on two cases.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Speedle and Delko are enjoying a hot Miami nightspot, "Club Descent," when the DJ's pyrotechnics triggers a fire that engulfs the club.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs delve into the "tweaker" culture after a brutal murder and near-fatal explosion takes place at the home of a methamphetamine addict.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio is called to the Miami West Detention Center to investigate a murdered inmate, he ends up witnessing three inmates escape.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a young model is killed by a hit and run driver, Horatio investigates the car's owner, who claims he loaned it out to the guests at his party.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A man harpooned to his yacht leads Horatio into the world of modern-day treasure hunting and the massive greed that goes along with it.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Tennis phenom Lana Walker is taken from her bedroom in the night and the only evidence they have to go on is a purple fiber found in the window frame.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a former rape victim is beaten to within inches of her life, Horatio must enter the world of prisons and parolees to find the culprit.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a robbery/homicide leaves two men dead and a third still alive, Horatio is determined to find out what really happened.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Todd Burton is trying to drive out of the hurricane's fury when he kills a man in the blinding storm and is now accused of vehicular manslaughter.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A gas man is engulfed in invisible flames and dies all of which happens during a qualifying race at the Grand Prix Americas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: La vida del detective Frank Tripp pende de un hilo cuando pisa una mina terrestre mientras investiga la escena de un crimen. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando secuestran un camión lleno de armas confiscadas y devuelven las armas al público, Horatio relaciona el crimen con Clavo Cruz.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Declaran muerto a un miembro del equipo tras recibir un disparo en la cabeza. No queriendo darse por vencido, Horatio hace que el equipo de CSI corra al hospital.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben investigar cuando los padres de una niñera en un vecindario exclusivo son brutalmente asesinados.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un fin de semana de caza se vuelve mortal cuando un oso ataca a alguien del grupo y la evidencia sugiere un crimen. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un rico promotor inmobiliario, Horatio y el equipo de CSI sospecha de la esposa y las dos hermanas gemelas secretas de ella.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español

programme.desc: Una mujer violada (Alicia Neira) se dispone a rehacer su vida con otro hombre (Luis Aguilar), pero el bandido que la poseyó (Enrique Zambrano) se lo obstaculiza. Solamente queda la venganza, el dolor, y el amor eterno en una pelicula llena de accion.

programme.title: La trampa mortal
programme.desc: Melquíades, un astuto ranchero, se apodera ilegalmente de la hacienda vecina mediante su habilidad para jugar al póquer, lo que conduce a un ciclo de venganza cuando el hijo del dueño regresa años después para buscar justicia.

programme.title: Kalifornia
programme.desc: Una pareja decide ir a conocer los lugares donde se cometieron los crímenes de un libro de asesinos en serie, pero ni se imaginan que no tienen que ir muy lejos para conocer a unos brutales criminales.

programme.title: Jade
programme.desc: Corelli está hasta el cuello en un caso que puede conducirlo donde no quiere ir. Chazz Palminteri interpreta a Matt, abogado y amigo de Corelli. Linda Fiorentino es la esposa de Matt, Trina; una psicóloga capaz de todo incluso de asesinar.

programme.title: Bandidos
programme.desc: ¡Prepárate para una comedia de acción de lo más divertida con Bruce Willis, Billy Bob Thornton y Cate Blanchett! Joe (Willis) y Terry (Thornton), dos convictos, arman un plan para robar un banco… hasta que se topan con una ama de casa bastante excéntrica.

programme.title: Miami Blues
programme.desc: Un sociópata se lía a cometer crímenes a diestro y siniestro en Miami y se enrolla con una prostituta confiada, mientras da esquinazo a un policía algo torpe.

programme.title: Número De Suerte
programme.desc: John Travolta y Lisa Kudrow forman un "equipo de comedia de alta energía" en esta comedia divertida inspirada en una estafa de la vida real para ganar la lotería de Pensilvania.

programme.title: El abogado del mal
programme.desc: Jamie Foxx presenta la inspiradora historia real del director de una banda de música de instituto que transformó a su variopinta banda de jazz en un legendario grupo de funk que arrasó en todo el país.

programme.title: Knock knock: seducción fatal
programme.desc: El gesto amable de un hombre de familia (Keanu Reeves) se convierte en una peligrosa seducción y el juego mortal del gato y el ratón cuando les abre la puerta a dos desamparadas jovencitas.

programme.title: Aventura en Alaska
programme.desc: Tras graduarse de la Universidad Emory en 1992, el estudiante estrella y atleta Christopher McCandless abandonó sus posesiones, entregó sus ahorros de $24.000 a la caridad y se fue a dedo hasta Alaska a vivir en la naturaleza.

programme.title: Knock knock: seducción fatal
programme.desc: El gesto amable de un hombre de familia (Keanu Reeves) se convierte en una peligrosa seducción y el juego mortal del gato y el ratón cuando les abre la puerta a dos desamparadas jovencitas.

programme.title: Un perdedor sin suerte
programme.desc: Ferrell nunca ha estado mejor (Galán) como un vendedor que pierde a su esposa y su trabajo en el mismo día y, ante el colapso de su vida, empieza a vivir en su patio delantero.

programme.title: Babel (ESP)
programme.desc: Del aclamado director Alejandro González Iñárritu (Amores Perros, 21 Gramos) llega el tercer filme de su trilogía, Babel, una película aplaudida por la crítica y de una gran emotividad sobre las barreras que separan a la humanidad.

programme.title: Sopa de tortilla
programme.desc: Un master chef mexicanoamericano y padre de tres hijas ha perdido su gusto por la comida, pero no por la vida.

programme.title: Están todos bien
programme.desc: Cuando los hijos de Frank Goode (Robert DeNiro) cancelan una reunión familiar, el viudo emprende un viaje por el país para reconectarse con ellos. Esperando compartir las alegrías de sus vidas felices, sus visitas revelan una imagen no muy perfecta.

programme.title: La familia Perez
programme.desc: En el 1980, un dueño de una hacienda cubana es finalmente liberado tras pasar 20 años en la cárcel. Anhelando con ver a su esposa e hija, a él le permiten entrar al barco migratorio que va para Florida.

programme.title: Un tipo duro 3
programme.desc: Frank Vega (Danny Trejo) y Bernie Pope (Danny Glover) regresan, esta vez a Louisiana para intentar encontrar a un amigo secuestrado.

programme.title: La máquina asesina
programme.desc: Un asesino entrenado en la Unión Soviética está decidido a escapar de su doble vida de asesino a sueldo y padre.

programme.title: Cara o sello
programme.desc: Carlos Mendoza es un policía honesto. Cuando no acepta un soborno y encarcela a los culpables, despierta la ira de un narcotraficante local, que secuestra a su familia y lo hace elegir entre su familia, su carrera y su compañero.

programme.title: Elefante blanco
programme.desc: Un asesino es contratado por un hombre de negocios para vengar el asesinato de su hija por parte de traficantes de esclavos blancos en Tailandia.

programme.title: Perdido en la fama
programme.desc: Un rockero semi retirado y caprichoso (Antonio Banderas) debe espabilarse para rescatar a su esposa, quien ha sido secuestrada mientras se encontraba de vacaciones en Chile.

programme.title: Freeway
programme.desc: Intentando huir de su vida, la delincuente juvenil adolescente Vanessa Lutz se va a vivir con su abuela. En su camino, conoce a Bob Wolverton, un asesino en serie encantador pero sádico.

programme.title: The Cold Light of Day
programme.desc: Bruce Willis, Sigourney Weaver and Henry Cavill star in this pulse-pounding thriller about a man trying to save his kidnapped family.

programme.title: Redención
programme.desc: Jason Statham interpreta a un cobrador que trabaja para un jefe de la mafia local en este thriller de acción de alto octanaje. Afectado por el asesinato de un amigo y consumido por deseos de venganza, se sumerge en un mundo de violencia.

programme.title: Max
programme.desc: Un perro que ayudó a los soldados en Afganistán vuelve a los EUA, donde lo adopta la familia de su adiestrador tras sufrir una experiencia traumática.

programme.title: Max 2: el héroe de la casa blanca
programme.desc: Max, el héroe canino del servicio secreto del presidente de Estados Unidos, vuelve a la acción. Debe mantener a la hija del lider ruso y al hijo del presidente a salvo mientras descubren un alarmante complot que pone en peligro a ambas naciones.

programme.title: The PEBBLE AND THE PENGUIN
programme.desc: In love with Marina, the most beautiful penguin in all the land, hopeless romantic Hubie must thwart the plans of his evil rival, Drake, and win Marina’s heart in this charming, animated adventure from the creators of All Dogs Go To Heaven.

programme.title: Un gallo con muchos huevos
programme.desc: Cuando su hogar se ve amenazado por un malvado granjero, un pequeño gallo viene al rescate. En esta excelente película animada de larga duración, la cual garantiza hacer reír a toda la familia.

programme.title: Perro Genial
programme.desc: Una familia debe mudarse a un apartamento en la ciudad de Nueva York que tenga una política estricta de no mascotas.

programme.title: Max
programme.desc: Un perro que ayudó a los soldados en Afganistán vuelve a los EUA, donde lo adopta la familia de su adiestrador tras sufrir una experiencia traumática.

programme.title: Max 2: el héroe de la casa blanca
programme.desc: Max, el héroe canino del servicio secreto del presidente de Estados Unidos, vuelve a la acción. Debe mantener a la hija del lider ruso y al hijo del presidente a salvo mientras descubren un alarmante complot que pone en peligro a ambas naciones.

programme.title: Héroes
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes estadounidenses con habilidades especiales deben apurarse para encontrar a una chica en Hong Kong antes de que lo haga una sombría organización gubernamental llamada División.

programme.title: El chico de oro
programme.desc: Como “El Elegido”, Murphy está en una alocada misión para salvar al Chico de oro, un joven con místicos poderes quien ha sido abducido por un culto maligno.

programme.title: Un lobo adolescente 2
programme.desc: Te esperan las más emocionante y divertidas aventuras junto al galán más apuesto de los Estados Unidos. Un joven adolescente que tiene muchos más problemas que los demás, ya que con la salida de cada luna llena, se convierte en un hombre lobo.

programme.title: Y Dios creó a la mujer
programme.desc: De Mornay interpreta a una mujer presa por error, que está decidida a recuperar su libertad.

programme.title: Envidia
programme.desc: Un hombre empieza a sentir cada vez más celos del nuevo éxito de su amigo.

programme.title: Una guerra de película
programme.desc: Ben Stiller, Jack Black y Robert Downey Jr. encabezan un reparto singular en 'Una Guerra de Película', una comedia de acción sobre un grupo de actores que se disponen a realizar la película de guerra más cara.

programme.title: Cocodrilo Dundee
programme.desc: Michael J. "Cocodrilo" Dundee es un australiano de espíritu libre que caza cocodrilos con las manos, les clava la mirada a búfalos de agua y bebe hasta desmadrarse.

programme.title: "Cocodrilo" Dundee II
programme.desc: Justo cuando el australiano excéntrico comienza a acostumbrarse a la vida en la ciudad de Nueva York, Dundee y su hermosa novia (Linda Kozlowski) son blanco de muerte de una pandilla de feroces traficantes de drogas.

programme.title: Un amor
programme.desc: Los amigos de la infancia Bruno y Lalo son inseparables. Hasta que una joven hermosa y de espíritu libre llamada Lisa entra en sus vidas, volviéndolos locos y encendiendo un apasionado pero desgarrador triángulo amoroso.

programme.title: Bala mordida
programme.desc: Mauro Hernández es un joven policía que bajo las órdenes de su comandante se ve involucrado en un intercambio de droga.

programme.title: Todo Incluido
programme.desc: Una familia de vacaciones se ve obligada a esconderse en su habitación de hotel cuando un huracán arrasa el centro turístico, donde pronto empiezan a revelarse verdades que han permanecido ocultas durante mucho tiempo.

programme.title: Qué pena tu vida
programme.desc: Un hombre inseguro y con el corazón roto, trata de recuperar a su último amor con la ayuda de su amigo fiel, tomando un camino de malas decisiones que lo llevan a comprenderse a sí mismo y a los demás.

programme.title: ¿Quieres ser mi hijo?
programme.desc: Una mujer de 40 años le pide a su vecino de 23 años, a quien detesta, que finja ser su hijo, durante un viaje de fin de semana para obtener un trabajo que le ayudará a regresar a la vida que perdió.

programme.title: Ya veremos
programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: Beso de Año Nuevo
programme.desc: La protagonista principal Kelly Hartwick se enfoca en una campana nueva para Navidad, mientras que un hombre de la calle la convence de tratar de buscar el amor de su vida en línea.

programme.title: Yes Virginia, There Is A Santa Claus
programme.desc: Inspired by the famous 1897 editorial that has become a holiday staple, Young Virginia O'Hanlan who, at the urging of her father, writes a letter to New York newspaper The Sun asking for the truth about the existence of Santa Claus.

programme.title: Perruestrado en Navidad
programme.desc: Un asistente de influencers y un encantador veterinario forman un equipo para encontrar un cachorro antes de Navidad.

programme.title: La Lista Perfecta Para Navidad
programme.desc: Una mujer inventa un plan para reparar la relación entre su hija y su nieta justo para navidad.

programme.title: Beso de Año Nuevo
programme.desc: La protagonista principal Kelly Hartwick se enfoca en una campana nueva para Navidad, mientras que un hombre de la calle la convence de tratar de buscar el amor de su vida en línea.

programme.title: Yes Virginia, There Is A Santa Claus
programme.desc: Inspired by the famous 1897 editorial that has become a holiday staple, Young Virginia O'Hanlan who, at the urging of her father, writes a letter to New York newspaper The Sun asking for the truth about the existence of Santa Claus.

programme.title: Los 12 perros de Navidad
programme.desc: Un padre viudo y desempleado envía a regañadientes a su hija a permanecer con su tía en una ciudad que ha prohibido los perros. En el camino a la escuela un día encuentra un perrito y decide quedárselo.

programme.title: La leyenda del jinete sin cabeza
programme.desc: Johnny Depp es Ichabod Crane, un investigador decidido a detener los asesinatos del Jinete Sin Cabeza.

programme.title: La maldición de Hollow Glen
programme.desc: Hace doscientos años, los habitantes de Hollow Glen sacrificaron a un niño deforme en una hoguera, y del humo surgió algo tan malvado y monstruoso que maldijo al pueblo para siempre.

programme.title: Habitación Ouija
programme.desc: Una mujer agorafóbica comienza a convocar espíritus para que sean sus amigos mientras su hermano / cuidador no está durante el día, pero cuanto más tiempo pasa con los espíritus, más claro se vuelve que no son tan amigables después de todo.

programme.title: Viernes 13
programme.desc: El campamento Lago Crystal ha estado cerrado durante más de 20 años debido a varios feroces asesinatos sin resolver.

programme.title: Viernes 13: parte 2
programme.desc: Cinco años después del baño de sangre en Camp Crystal, todo lo que queda es la leyenda de Jason y su madre demente, que había asesinado a siete consejeros del campamento.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte 3
programme.desc: Ignorando el sangriento legado de Camp Crystal Lake, uno por uno son víctimas del maníaco Jason que los acecha a cada paso ...

programme.title: Viernes 13: El capítulo final
programme.desc: Después de su renacimiento en una morgue del hospital, el asesino de la máscara de hockey fija su atención vengativa en la familia Jarvis y un grupo de adolescentes hasta ahora despreocupados.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte V: un nuevo comienzo
programme.desc: Esta vez parece haber puesto la mira en los pacientes jóvenes de una casa aislada. Y más de unos pocos de sus objetivos adolescentes terminan por la mitad, en cuartos ... lo que sea, Jason lo hace.

programme.title: Viernes 13 parte VI: Jason vive
programme.desc: De niño, Tommy Jarvis hizo algo que muchos murieron intentando hacer: mató a Jason Vorhees, el asesino que aterrorizó a Crystal Lake. Ahora, años después, Tommy está atormentado por el temor de que Jason siga vivo.

programme.title: The Missouri Breaks
programme.desc: Marlon Brando and Jack Nicholson ignite the screen in this rousing story of a wealthy Montana rancher who hires a professional killer to track down a gang of horse thieves.

programme.title: Hills Of Utah
programme.desc: Gene Autry returns to the town where his father was murdered and finds a mine owner and cattleman feuding. Things get complicated when a boy dies and the mine owner comes gunning for Gene.

programme.title: Blue Montana Skies
programme.desc: Gene Autry heads North to apprehend fur smugglers plundering the trappers' pelts, and then return to the U.S. When the trail leads to the H-H dude ranch owned by a beautiful gal, the action heats up.

programme.title: Robin Hood Of Texas
programme.desc: Gene Autry and the Cass County Boys are unjustly arrested as bank bandits. Released by police as decoys to locate the loot, Gene and the boys find themselves in trouble with the real bank robbers.

programme.title: The Shooting
programme.desc: A mysterious woman persuades two cowboys to help her in a revenge scheme.

programme.title: Alias Jesse James
programme.desc: In this hilarious western spoof, insurance broker Milford Farnsworth (Bob Hope) unwittingly sells a life insurance policy worth $100,000 to the infamous Jesse James. Now, he has to figure out how to keep the deadliest outlaw in history alive!

programme.title: The Hills Run Red
programme.desc: A man recently released from a five-year prison sentence seeks vengeance against the former friend who has violated his trust and sought his death. Starring Thomas Hunter, Henry Silva, and Dan Duryea.

programme.title: Invitation to a Gunfighter
programme.desc: Screen legend Yul Brynner turns in a magnificent performance as a gunfighter who must do battle with his most formidable adversary - his own conscience - in this gripping, double-barreled western full of surprise twists and colorful villainy.

programme.title: Duel at Diablo
programme.desc: Frontier scout Jess Remsberg leads a wagon train through hostile territory to Fort Conchos. But underneath his valor, he has an ulterior motive: to settle a score with the man he believes killed his wife. James Garner and Sidney Poitier star.

programme.title: The Train
programme.desc: Screen greats Burt Lancaster, Paul Scofield and Jeanne Moreau star in this suspense-laden tale of justice and retribution as a French Resistance fighter (Lancaster) attempts to stop a Nazi commander from looting the art treasures of Paris.

programme.title: His Girl Friday
programme.desc: A newspaper editor uses every trick in the book to keep his ace reporter ex-wife from remarrying.

programme.title: A Funny Thing Happened on the Way to the Forum
programme.desc: Zero Mostel, Buster Keaton, Phil Silvers and an all-star cast scam their way through this boisterous romp amidst gorgeous girls, mistaken identities, stunning surprises, cunning disguises and great Sondheim songs.

programme.title: How to Succeed in Business Without Really Trying (1967)
programme.desc: This hilarious musical stars Robert Morse as a charming and scheming window washer who climbs to the top of the corporate ladder by way of a self-help book.

programme.title: Marty
programme.desc: Ernest Borgnine won a Best Actor Oscar for his role as a Bronx butcher who gives up on love, until he meets an equally lonely school teacher in this charming story that garnered a total of four Oscars including Best Picture.

programme.title: Come Back, Little Sheba
programme.desc: Based on William Inge's classic play, Come Back, Little Sheba is the stirring tale of a life-weary couple who rescue hope from the ruins of the past.

programme.title: The Miracle Worker
programme.desc: Academy Awards went to Best Actress Anne Bancroft and Best Supporting Actress Patty Duke for their moving portrayals of Annie Sullivan and her remarkable blind and deaf pupil, Helen Keller.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The family continues to reminisce on Mike and Gloria's second wedding anniversary and they recall the actual day Mike and Gloria got married. Edith must gather up strength to tell Gloria about 'the birds and the bees'.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: When Edith finds some old lottery tickets, Archie hits the roof claiming she was wasting money. However, Archie's attitude quickly changes when one of the tickets is a winner, but there is a catch: Edith claims the tickets belong to George Jefferson.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: One morning Archie gets up, goes to his front door to get the newspaper and is shocked to discover that someone has painted a swastika on his front door. Archie soon gets into a debate with Mike as to who could have painted it and why.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve and time for Walter's annual party for his employees. But he's certain the fun will be spoiled by Maude's houseguest, a women's rights activist given to confrontations.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's priceless crystal bowl gets broken -- and there are three conflicting stories describing the accident.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: The biggest surprise at Walter's surprise birthday party is his arrest for 'lewd and lascivious' behavior. Walter's alibi is almost as embarrassing to him as the charge itself: he was stuffing himself with popcorn at a Donald Duck film festival.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Henry Fonda makes a rare television guest appearance when Maude decides he is an ideal candidate for President of the United States and starts the campaign without him, in the first half of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude persists in spearheading a movement to draft Henry Fonda for President and has everyone around her convinced that she must be a manic-depressive in need of professional care.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude uses her position as director of Tuckahoe's Bicentennial musical extravaganza to create a tribute to American women -- a theme that hardly thrills Walter, Arthur, and the colonel in charge of the armory where the show is to be staged.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The high-spirited taxi gang helps a jittery Bobby fight potential disappointment when he decides that he will end his stage career if he doesn’t get an acting job before midnight.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas faces deportation unless he marries a U.S. citizen. The taxi gang comes to his rescue by pitching in and hiring a local working girl to be his bride.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: John and his new wife, Suzanne, reach a crisis point in their marriage when one of them must drop out of college due to financial woes.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A Christmas party at the garage is interrupted when Louie, the dispatcher teams up with Alex in a game of high-stakes poker against his cardshark brother Nick.

programme.title: The Odd Couple (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Felix and Oscar's bowling team, the "Bon Vivants," battle the "Kingpins" for the championship in a game which marks the first time in five years the Bon Vivantshave a chance to win.

programme.title: The Odd Couple (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Oscar gets a chance to appear as himself in a Hollywood movie and Felix nearly botches everything by accompanying him as a self-appointed agent.

programme.title: The Odd Couple (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Felix Unger, hired to photograph a dog food commercial featuring "Silver, The Wonder Dog," feels the animal is being maltreated, so "accidentally" lures him away to save him.

programme.title: The Odd Couple (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Oscar loses money in a poker game and when he can't pay the debt in cash, he donates Felix's band, the Sophisticados, to Billie Joe as payment instead.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Steve (Fred MacMurray) enjoys working with a woman engineer (Dorothy Green), who is beautiful. He asks her out for dinner, but she is only interested in work.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: The Douglas's stove breaks down on Thanksgiving Day. There's no way to get it fixed that same day and every restaurant in town is booked.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: While Mike and Robbie go camping in the woods, Chip and Steve go "rafting" in the backyard.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Lonesome George Gobel is in town for a benefit and escapes to the Douglas household for some "quiet" time.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The Petries' second honeymoon becomes a disaster when Laura's toe gets caught in a bath spout.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob and Laura have no choice but to wear gloves to an important community banquet after accidentally dying their hands black.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Alan needs Rob's help improving a script for his Broadway debut.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob recalls his first meeting with Alan Brady during a stay-awake marathon for his disc-jockey job.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Floyd retires, leaving Uncle Joe to take over the duties of running the Cannonball, once again. His strict schedule-keeping is the least of the valley's worries, as the C&FW Railroad is planning to scrap the train for a tax write-off!

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Billie Jo tries to spread love through the valley with a new theory of sensitivity training.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A respectable small-town salesman witnesses the murder of a prostitute but, afraid of personal embarrassment, refuses to testify.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Steve McGarrett encounters a small guerrilla force who steals arms from an armory to support a revolution in their own country.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A radical Chinese Maoist student attending the university is found dead just as McGarrett has obtained evidence of his connection with the Communist intelligence ring.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A foreign agent exposes McGarrett to the grim possibility of germ warfare and the potential loss of Hawaii's sugar industry. Meanwhile, McGarrett and his three-man special police force pick up clues, which lead to the agent's whereabouts.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby teams up with a man from British Intelligence to locate rare porcelain vases from The Habsburg Collection that they believe are in the possession of a German double-agent named Raven.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby is hired by the attorney of a woman who is suspected of having something to do with her husbands death. But as the investigation progresses the clues point Barnaby in a different direction.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: An aging star of the stage trying to make a comeback is being terrorized by someone who doesn't want to see that happen. Barnaby is hired by her agent to sift through the long list of possible suspects.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A mentally unstable young man who was declared innocent of murder by reason of insanity several years ago is once again suspected of murder. It's up to Barnaby to prove him innocent of being who authorities are calling "The Orchid Killer".

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix is called in the middle of the night by an acquaintance, Pete Neal, and offered $1,000 to protect a man named Frank Devereau just until the following morning.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Peter Martin, the son of a respected doctor who often ministered to the less fortunate, is found at the bottom of the stairs in his home with his neck broken.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Joe Mannix must find the kidnapped daughter of a Palm Springs mobster.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A potential candidate for governor employs Interect to probe his background. He believes that if the detective agency can't find dirt on him, then his political opponents won't.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Lieutenant Michael Stone and Inspector Steven Keller investigate the murder of women. The murderer was wearing an officer's uniform of the United States Air Force.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Mike's former partner returns to San Francisco, but not because of any longing for the good old days. He is back in town to kill the hired gunman who murdered his son years before.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is held as a virtual prisoner by an old man who has shunned civilization for fourteen years.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Richard Kimble finds himself a patient in a prison hospital. However, he is there as a hero, not as a prison inmate.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Captain Devane tries to take Hunter and McCall off the investigation of his ex-wife's murder and violates his forced leave of absence to pursue the killer himself.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: A Colombian drug dealer is murdered, and police informant Sporty James becomes the prime suspect, hunted by both Hunter and the criminals.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall's investigation of the stabbing of a deaf man hinges on cryptic clues the victim gave in sign language before he died.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan tries to solve a friend's murder while Steve investigates the deceased's ex-wife and her identical twin sister.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuando se calma el agua
programme.desc: Un dirigente sindical es ejecutado en su casa poco después de una huelga de los miembros del sindicato. Ni su esposa ni nadie en el vecindario escuchó ningún disparo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mark Fair se fue a trabajar y su prometida, Karla Brown, se quedó en casa. Más tarde, la encontró muerta. Durante la autopsia, se volvieron a examinar las marcas de mordeduras en su cuerpo y la odontología forense identificó al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, Judy Southern llegó a casa del trabajo y recibió un disparo de un hombre armado que esperaba dentro. Su esposo llegó poco después, llamó a los servicios de emergencia y la llevó al hospital.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Avis Banks y su hijo no nacido fueron brutalmente asesinados. El cuerpo fue descubierto por su prometido Keyon Pittman. La policía se enteró de que Pittman estaba teniendo aventuras con otras mujeres y se convirtió en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, en Grand Junction, Colorado suceden una serie de bombardeos que matan a dos personas y lastiman a uno más. La policía corre para poder encontrar al culpable antes de que vuelva a atacar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía sospecha del Dr. John Jack Boyle en la desaparición de su esposa, Noreen, cuando firma los papeles de la hipoteca de una nueva casa con una mujer que se hace pasar por su esposa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de doce años reclama que ha sido secuestrada y abusada sexualmente. Ella contó lo que había pasado con voz calma, sin alteraciones ni emociones, lo que hizo difícil que la policía le creyera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Rompiendo el molde
programme.desc: El hijo de tres años de unos padres de Dripping Springs, Texas, desarrolla una condición respiratoria.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2008, el desarrollador inmobiliario de Colorado, Alan Helmick, fue encontrado muerto a tiros en su casa por su esposa Miriam, quien luego se convirtió en la principal sospechosa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1992, Dawn Bruce, de 22 años, es brutalmente asesinada en su apartamento de Virginia. Los investigadores notan una mancha de sangre en la funda de una almohada que parece haber sido hecha por uno de los dedos del asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2003, Kathy Lorick fue asesinada en una pista de carreras en Concord, California, en pleno día, mientras hablaba con su esposo por su teléfono móvil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un embrague de testigos
programme.desc: Dos testigos presenciales pueden tener la llave de la muerte de un miembro de una pandilla de motociclistas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2000, Christina Sanoubane fue asesinada en su departamento de Cedar Rapids después de dejar a su abusivo novio. Hay pistas en la escena: huellas sangrientas y ADN del kit de violación de la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una maestra dedicada y respetada desapareció, la policía tuvo que determinar si se había ido de vacaciones sin decírselo a nadie, o si era víctima de un juego sucio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Testigo presencial
programme.desc: Una adolescente desapareció después de una noche de paseos a caballo. Su cuerpo fue encontrado un mes después, a cinco kilómetros de su casa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe de una madre y sus hijos resultan ser algo más grave: intoxicación por talio. Después de la muerte de la madre, los investigadores centran su atención en encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Reencuentro
programme.desc: Durante años, una mujer sufrió lo que parecían ser los efectos secundarios desagradables del litio, un medicamento recetado para tratar el trastorno bipolar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A la mano
programme.desc: Un oficial de policía acusado de matar a su ex esposa insiste en que ella se suicidó. Los investigadores dicen que fue un asesinato, que era físicamente imposible que la mujer se disparara.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Timothy Wilson Spencer fue identificado como el hombre que violó y estranguló a cinco jóvenes mujeres en Virginia. Con el uso de perfiles de ADN, se libera a un hombre inocente y se condena al verdadero asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En las zonas rurales de Canadá, el Dr. John Schneeberger es acusado de sedar y agredir sexualmente a una de sus pacientes y a su hijastra. Las pruebas de ADN demuestran que el doctor es inocente, pero la paciente insiste en que la sedó y violó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las vacaciones familiares se convierten en una pesadilla cuando a una mujer la encuentran boca abajo en un lago.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de ser admitido en el hospital con una hemorragia inexplicable, Chad Shelton de 11 meses llega a fallecer. Los investigadores y científicos buscan desesperadamente una causa cuando otros de la misma casa se enferman.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una talentosa presentadora de noticias de televisión fue asesinada a tiros fuera de su casa; parecía ser un crimen pasional, perpetrado por un fanático obsesionado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1989, los cadáveres de Joan Rogers y sus dos hijas adolescentes fueron encontrados flotando en la Bahía de Tampa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el estreno de la serie Archivos Forenses (Forensic Files), la serie de crímenes reales más extensa de la historia, una asistente de vuelo de Connecticut desaparece. La policía sospecha que su esposo es culpable de asesinato, pero ¿pueden comprobarlo?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Obsesión de verano
programme.desc: En un próspero suburbio de Filadelfia, la policía fue llamada a la escena de lo que parecía ser un ahogamiento accidental.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una hermosa joven cayó a su muerte desde un acantilado con vistas al océano. Inicialmente, los investigadores pensaron que se trataba de un trágico accidente.

programme.desc: When a luxury car dealer is found dead, detectives suspect one of his lovers, but lack of evidence stalls the case for a year until one clue breaks it wide open.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A man and his son are shot to death, tearing their family apart.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Facing elimination, one woman makes a shocking move and what Vinny does next upsets the whole house. Pauly gets Vinny to reveal his sensitive and artistic side.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: When Pauly and Nikki become suspicious of two of the women, Vinny makes a move that rattles the rest of the house. A horse race ends with one lady going on a date with Vinny and the rest getting relationship advice from Pauly and Nikki.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Chaos follows when Snooki and JWoww get the ladies to spill the tea. Vinny makes a love connection with someone unexpected. An argument between the women leads to a very awkward dinner.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly and Nikki invite the ladies to join a fun game of improv until things get out of hand. Vinny insults one of the ladies and ends up in the doghouse. Vinny makes a surprising move at elimination.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Excitement turns to embarrassment when the ladies' friends and family come for a visit and start revealing the ladies' secrets. Vinny gets roasted by a parent. And a dinner conversation raises red flags for Pauly and Nikki.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: The pressure is on when the ladies must make good impressions on Vinny's mom, Paola, and Uncle Nino. Paola's shocking feedback leaves Vinny confused about who to send home.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Double dates with Pauly and Nikki give Vinny a glimpse at his future with "the one" as he makes his final decision. Vinny shocks one lady by sending her home early.

programme.title: I Love New York: Do You Have Love For New York?
programme.desc: After getting her heart broken not once but twice, New York summons 20 single men to her mansion with the hope of finding true love. The guys think its one big party until New York's mom busts in through the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Mangeant
programme.desc: Chamo, NY's Assistant, calls the 15 guys to the backyard for a meeting. New York addresses them from her balcony – they will be competing in a male beauty pageant, a mangeant, and the winners will get dates with her.

programme.title: I Love New York: Big Ballers
programme.desc: The remaining 12 guys start their day with the usual trash-talking until Chamo delivers a New York Note.

programme.title: I Love New York: What's Up Dog
programme.desc: Chamo delivers a New York Note to the guys: it says that NY wants a man that is good with his hands. The remaining 9 guys will break up into 3 teams of 3 and build dog houses for NY's Chihuahua, Her Majesty.

programme.title: I Love New York: Who's Got Game
programme.desc: New York is down to her lucky 7 and wants to know which guys have skills on the court. She's lookin' for a baller.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma Said Knock You Out
programme.desc: The 6 guys gather in the living room when New York tells them that they will be hosting a party for her girls while she goes shopping. The guys' excitement turns to terror when ten screaming 11-year-old girls run in the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: New York decides to do a background check on the remaining 5 guys so she invites their ex-girlfriends to a day at the spa. While the guys sweat it out at the mansion, their ex's give NY and her mom all the dirt they want to know.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Imogen worries about her dad's strange behavior. Becky bonds with Adam without realizing that he's transgender. Katie and Jake realize they have feelings for each other -- but where does that leave Mike Dallas?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare writes an article that stirs up trouble at school and makes her a new enemy -- Mike Dallas. Tori, Tristan, and Dave compete in a talent contest. Drew feels distant from Bianca, so he goes on a spending spree.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Eli organizes a surprise birthday party to cheer Clare up, and starts to suspect that she's hiding something. Audra urges Drew to go back to Degrassi. Dave worries that he and Alli are growing apart.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When a group of parents try to stop the play, Eli takes action. As opening night approaches, Tristan realizes that if he doesn't find a boyfriend fast, his first kiss will be onstage -- with Dave. Meanwhile, Becky wants to "save" Adam.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: On opening night for Romeo and Jules, Tristan is nowhere to be found. Is it stage fright -- or something worse? While Eli is busy with the play, Clare decides to get even with Asher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Becky begins to fall for Adam, she worries how her conservative parents will react.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Becky doesn't want to keep Adam a secret, so she decides to tell her parents that he's transgender.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya is not feeling very good about herself, so she lets Tori give her a pageant-style makeover.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Fiona takes drastic measures to feel safer at home, and puts herself in danger. Dallas avoids telling Alli the truth about his past. After blowing off a French assignment, Zig tries to impress the teacher,

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya lets loose at a party and posts a video online, hoping it'll change her image. The battle for the student council presidency heats up when Drew enters the race. Connor tries to play matchmaker for his friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a stressful audition, Maya tosses her cello in the trash, and decides to have more fun. The competition between Drew and Clare intensifies. Connor offers Eli some advice about love.

programme.desc: School's out and summer's in! A few lucky Degrassi students are bound for a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Paris, accompanied by some fresh new faces. And then there are others playing counselor at Degrassi Day Camp.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: In the Lambeyeque valley in northern Peru lies a strange lost world, the forgotten ruins of 250 mysterious pyramids, including some of the biggest on the planet, colossal structures made out of mud bricks.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: It was one of the greatest vanishing acts in history. More than 3,000 years ago a mysterious and ruthless civilisation rose from nothing, created a brutal and unstoppable army and built an empire that rivalled Egypt and Babylon.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Dinosaur
programme.desc: David Attenborough tells the story of the discovery and reconstruction in Argentina of the world's largest known dinosaur, a brand new species of titanosaur. Measuring 37m long, it now holds the record as the biggest animal ever to walk the earth.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Discover the beasts of the Ice Age with Professor Alice Roberts. Alice's adventure begins in the Land of the Sabre-tooth.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Alice ventures to the parts of the northern hemisphere hit hardest by the cold - Europe and Siberia. High in the mountains of Transylvania, a cave sealed for thousands of years reveals grisly evidence of a fight to the death.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts journeys 40,000 years back in time on the trail of the great beasts of the ice age. This was the last time that giants like mammoths, woolly rhinos and sabre-toothed cats ruled our planet.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: In a time when monstrous creatures ruled the earth, South America was the land of the giants. Nigel Marven walks among these gigantic creatures, on a quest to witness the largest predator bringing down the largest prey.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Nigel Marven journeys back to the sand dunes of Mesozoic Mongolia to track the owner of the largest claws of all time, the Therizinosaurus. His adventure yields a series of surprising clues, a nest, footprints, dung, and more.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: The Making Of: Walking With Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Animatronics, computer animation and science re-create the dinosaurs' world.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the coelophysis and the diplodocus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the opthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the leaellynasaura and the tyrannosaurus.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.desc: The Doctor attempts to help the Brigadier penetrate the heat barrier.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor is captured by the villagers who are under the Master's control.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: UNIT have penetrated the heat barrier and launch an attack on the gargoyle, Bok.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Maltese hates being on his leash; an American Eskimo barks and circles strangers who enter the house; a Nova Scotia duck tolling retriever with a fear of pools.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a pregnant Ashlee Simpson-Wentz's English bulldog with his aggression issues before the baby arrives; a retriever with food aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive sheepdog/collie mix needs extra attention, so Cesar brings him to the Dog Psychology Center; a St. Bernard with a fear of stairs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Great Dane behaves aggressively toward strange dogs; a Lhasa apso eats everything she can get her paws on.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Chihuahua mix with aggression issues; a Pomeranian with severe separation anxiety; an Aussie/shar pei mix who runs away when his owner coughs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two wolf hybrids with aggression issues; an aggressive Chihuahua.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A basset hound is afraid of her owner's husband; a blue heeler mix with unique bedtime rituals.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A vicious Chihuahua frightens the pit bulls at the rescue center where he lives.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Wheaten terrier puppy bites when playing; a Jack Russell terrier jumps when the garbage disposal runs and lunges at the dishwasher; a Lab fears shiny floors.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar celebrates the show's 100th episode with a grand reunion of many of the past guests and their dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Daschund Lotus is very territorial; his aggression sends his owner Chari to the hospital; Cesar makes a house call to see Joey, a German Shepard who is territorial over the second story of his owner's home.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A French bulldog is nervous around other dogs and occasionally nips at people; a Vizsla who resists going outside due to her fear of cars.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A couple's Chihuahua mix terrorizes their mastiff and dominates the house; a pit bull is not growing out of his puppy behavior.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive English bulldog/Lab mix; a cocker spaniel with a life-threatening appetite for paper products.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog kick-starts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere, and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail, leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday, but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday, but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth calls a client, Daphne, whose bond they have to revoke and makes a shocking discovery: Daphne's cosigner on her bond and ex-boyfriend, Bobby, has just committed suicide.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community, where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kolani's on the run, left his wife to look after four kids, and left Dog holding the bag for the $10k bond. So their pursuit of this case takes them into some parts of Oahu, and the human heart, that few of us will ever see.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today the crew is hunting for Holly, a car thief. She's one of Tim's bonds, and the entire Dog crew knows that means trouble--or at least a long and difficult chase.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis attempts to bribe Kirby to prevent her from marrying Adam; Claudia receives another package from her late husband; Fallon remains unable to walk, until her child's life is in danger.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle learns she is pregnant; Fallon suffers from painful headaches; Claudia and Steven visit Matthew's accident site in Peru; once home, however, Claudia receives a phone call from her late husband.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis makes a plan to upset Blake's business deal with Rashid Ahmed; Tracy attempts to seduce Blake and is fired; Steven grows suspicious of Dex, who places a mysterious phone call to Claudia.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex finds Alexis with Rashid and turns to Tracy for comfort; learning the reasons behind her father's death, Kirby buys a gun; the mysterious caller turns out to be a tape-recorded message; Alexis moves ahead with her plan to ruin Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Kirby learns the truth behind her father's suicide; Krystle tells a stunned Alexis of her pregnancy; Fallon and Jeff announce they will remarry. Blake is planning to attack a nation involved in the China Seas Deal.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake travels to Hong Kong to patch up the China Seas oil deal and learns Ahmed has left the country; Mark blackmails Alexis for $100,000, and McVane watches as he deposits the check; Kirby attempts to kill Alexis but is unsuccessful.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis thwarts Blake's loan extension; Sammy Jo arrives in Denver to see her son; after quarreling with Alexis, Mark is found dead after a fall from her balcony.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake mortgages the mansion to raise money; Tracy tells Alexis of her affair with Dex; Alexis is questioned about Mark's death; Sammy Jo intends to obtain custody of her son; an unknown woman, full of curiosity about Alexis, checks into La Mirage.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Kirby's attempt to kill Alexis is unsuccessful, and Alexis promises to remain silent if Kirby will leave Adam; Sammy Jo reveals the culprit behind Claudia's mystery calls; Fallon is gripped with a seizure and drives off as her wedding is about to begin.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Following a serious traffic accident, Fallon mysteriously vanishes. Dex and Steven bail Alexis out of jail. Sammy Jo attempts to seduce Adam. Alexis flatters Adam by suggesting he work with her defense attorney, Warren Ballard.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven accuses Adam of conspiring with Sammy Jo to kidnap Danny. Blake arranges to take out a mortgage on the mansion. He little suspects Alexis has signed the note and will become the owner if he defaults.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: To secure financing for his bankrupt company, Blake arranges to see Billy Waite, a notoriously underhanded oil man. Jeff continues his search for Fallon. Impatient with the progress her lawyer is making on her defense, Alexis fires Warren Ballard.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: In Seattle, Jeff and Blake learn the woman who died in the plane crash with Peter DeVilbis cannot be positively identified, but the ring she was wearing is indeed Fallon's wedding band. Back in Denver, Fallon's moving funeral is held.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake visits Dominique at La Mirage to discuss her recent revelation. She tells Blake that her mother was a long-time mistress of his father and has evidence to prove it. At Alexis' trial, a neighbor offers powerful evidence that incriminates Alexis.

programme.desc: Odalie tries to overcome an injury and preserve her place on the tour; Tal tries to relieve the guilt she feels and deserve Odalie's forgiveness; Rigo finds it difficult to maintain peace among his friends and find out who to trust.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water

programme.desc: In this thrill-a-minute film, action superstar Chuck Norris stars as a martial arts champion enlisted to help track down a serial killer...and the man responsible for the murder of his adoptive son. Jennifer O'Neill and Clu Gulager also star.
